text:
There once was a girl named Daisy who loved hummingbirds. Every spring she would gather some delicious hummingbird flowers. Sometimes she'd even keep them in a tiny bird feeder.

One day a magnificent purple-bordered fawn came visiting. Daisy watched fascinated. That evening, she noticed something unusual—three tiny pellets sticking right out.

That evening she fed them owl pellets. When she slept that night owl noises awakened her.

Morning dawned. She went outside. There was the little fawn!

Oh dear!

With a tiny stick.

That evening she watched. Owl eyes shimmered...

They flew away.

She never saw another one.

That's when she knew her little friend loved her.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
